title: The Q Devices & the Auto Doc
summary: The community's flagship instruments — consciousness-activated devices said to open portals, enhance intent, and anchor the Auto Doc healing system.
markdown:
The **Q Devices** are the community's flagship instruments — the productized descendants of
the seashell oracle that runs the sessions. Where the
[Source-Coil Device](/lore/source-coil-device/) is the channeling tool of the record itself,
the Q Devices — and the **Q.C.E.S.**, the *Quantum Consciousness Enhancement System* — are
what the teaching offers the student: apparatus said to be **activated by the user's own
intent**, amplifying consciousness the way the sessions say all real technology works.

The transcripts assign them serious duties. The April 7, 2020 session instructs a
participant *"through the methodology of using your Q device to facilitate the meeting of
consciousness… Open that [Stargate](/lore/stargate/) portal from the device"* — a
portal-opener in the hand. Later sessions fold in the **Auto Doc**: the healing-system
branch of the family, which by the [December 2023 session](/sessions/2023-12-23-nesara-gesara-first-contact/)
even carries its own token in the community's crypto economy. Kosol is recorded *"sharing
his wonderful Q-Devices"* with interviewers — the material culture of the practice,
circulating.

The community's own sites name the full line — *"Baramay or the Q1, Q2, Q6, Q24, Q144,
Q Grav, Q Replicator"* — described there as *"a quantum generator that has artificial
intelligence,"* built on *"fractal Fibonacci technology."* And the community's device
teaching is explicit that a Q Device is not owned so much as **entrusted**: it is presented
as *"a Being that is ALIVE,"* activated by breath (*"blowing on it"*) and *"unconditional
LOVE,"* with deactivation keys held by Kosol and two senior teachers — and misuse, the
teaching warns, *"will be punished by the Galactic Federation of Lights."* A device with
terms of service, enforced from orbit.

The Q Devices are where the archive's ideas are meant to become hardware: consciousness as
the power source (as the [Arcturian physicist](/lore/arcturians/) teaches), intent as the
interface, [Baramay](/lore/baramay/) as the operating system. Whether one reads them as
technology or as talisman, the record's claim is consistent: the device does nothing — *you*
do, and the device listens. Preserved as spoken.
